_comment: Default deck-agnostic opponent pool for intermediate self-play (2026-06-29; alakazam added 2026-06-30). Each Kaggle agent pilots its OWN deck (agent/kaggle_agents/<name>_deck.csv); add an archetype by dropping a vendored module + sibling deck here and adding a line — a config change, not a code change. 'self' + past checkpoints are added by the trainer, not listed here. Breadth across archetypes robustifies the trainee whichever deck it pilots (Metal control, Water tempo, Dragon spread, Fighting/Lucario, Psychic hand-scaling aggro). Weights track the recency-weighted top-band meta (Archaludon #1, Mega Starmie ex #2). kaggle:alakazam added at 1.5 to close the ladder blind spot (first RL sub went 0-3 vs Alakazam, rl_research/RL_LADDER_ANALYSIS_2026-06-30.md).
